questions.context_sentence: How do we compare with each other?
questions.cn: 我们如何相互比较？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：com(共同)+pare(看作pair一双)→把两个东西放到一双眼睛前共同看→“比较;对比”
questions.prompt: How do we ____ with each other? (提示: 比较;对比)

questions.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
questions.cn: 将每个单词与其反义词匹配：快的、害羞的、迟的、高的、懒惰的、大声的、有趣的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sh(沙发)+y(像树丫)→害羞得躲在沙发后面像个小树丫→“害羞的”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'shy'?

questions.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
questions.cn: 将每个单词与其反义词匹配：快的、害羞的、迟的、高的、懒惰的、大声的、有趣的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：la(拉)+zy(自愿)→拉他都不自愿动弹→“懒惰的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 懒惰的;懒洋洋的

questions.meaning: adv. 响亮地 adj.大声的
questions.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
questions.cn: 将每个单词与其反义词匹配：快的、害羞的、迟的、高的、懒惰的、大声的、有趣的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：l(楼)+oud(out出去)→在楼里大声叫喊声音传到外面去→“大声的”
questions.prompt: Please don't speak so ____ in the library. (提示: 响亮地;大声的)

questions.context_sentence: outgoing boring short quiet early slow hard-working
questions.cn: 外向的、无聊的、矮的/短的、安静的、早的、慢的、勤奋的
questions.hint: 联想记忆：out(外面)+going(走出的)→总是喜欢走到外面和人交往→“外向的”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'outgoing'?

questions.context_sentence: outgoing boring short quiet early slow hard-working
questions.cn: 外向的、无聊的、矮的/短的、安静的、早的、慢的、勤奋的
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hard(努力地)+working(工作学习)→努力地工作和学习→“勤奋的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 勤奋的

questions.context_sentence: Why don't you perform?
questions.cn: 你为什么不表演呢？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：per(每个)+form(表格/形式)→每一种形式都要上台展示一下→“表演”
questions.prompt: Why don't you ____ in the school talent show? (提示: 表演;执行)

questions.context_sentence: Well, I'm afraid of performing alone.
questions.cn: 嗯，我害怕独自表演。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：a(一个)+lone(看作long长)→一个人孤零零地面对长路→“独自”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'alone'?

questions.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
questions.cn: 陈洁害怕独自表演，所以他们通过一起演奏一首歌来解决这个问题。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(死/难)+olve(看作love爱)→用爱去感化死对头，从而“解决”了问题
questions.prompt: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they ____ the problem by playing a song together. (提示: 解决;解答)

questions.context_sentence: You play the Chinese flute better than anyone else in our music club.
questions.cn: 你吹中国长笛比我们音乐俱乐部里的其他任何人都好。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：f(飞)+lute(看作lute琵琶，乐器)→吹奏这个乐器时，声音好听得让人飞起→“长笛”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.长笛

questions.context_sentence: Congratulations on winning the prize at the school music festival!
questions.cn: 祝贺你在校园音乐节上获奖！
questions.hint: 联想记忆：con(共同)+grat(感激/开心)+ulation(名词后缀)→大家聚在一起表达开心→“祝贺”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'congratulation'?

questions.context_sentence: Congratulations on winning the prize at the school music festival!
questions.cn: 祝贺你在校园音乐节上获奖！
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pr(仆人)+ize(看作ice冰)→仆人把冰雕刻得很好，得到了国王的“奖励”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.奖;奖励

questions.context_sentence: You attended the festival last year and this year.
questions.cn: 你去年和今年都参加了这个节日。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：at(在)+tend(照料/倾向)→人到了现场去照料和关注→“参加;出席”
questions.prompt: You ____ the festival last year and this year. (提示: 参加;出席)

questions.meaning: prep.除……之外(还) adv. 而且
questions.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
questions.cn: 除了唱歌，你如何度过你的空闲时间？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：beside(在……旁边)+s(复数/多一个)→在旁边还多出了一个→“除……之外(还)”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'besides'?

questions.meaning: adj.空闲的;备用的 v. 抽出;拨出
questions.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
questions.cn: 除了唱歌，你如何度过你的空闲时间？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(死)+pare(削/剥离)→把死板的时间剥离出一部分来，作为“空闲的”时间
questions.prompt: Besides singing, how do you spend your ____ time? (提示: 空闲的)

questions.context_sentence: Our pleasure!
questions.cn: 我们的荣幸！
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please请/使高兴)+ure(名词后缀)→让人感到高兴的事情→“乐事;愉快”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 乐事;愉快;荣幸

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：appear(出现)+ance(名词后缀)→人一出现时给人的第一感觉→“外表”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'appearance'?

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：person(人)+ality(复合名词后缀)→一个人特有的核心特质→“性格”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 性格;品质

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+ri(日/天)+ous(多……的)→每天看起来都在盯着你、有很多话想说，表情很“严肃的”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'serious'?

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：st(身体)+rength(看作length长度)→身体能延展的最长程度反映出你的“力量”和“优势”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.优势;力量

questions.context_sentence: Is Julie slimmer than you ?
questions.cn: 朱莉比你更苗条吗？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(林)+lim(看作limb树枝/四肢)→身头像森林里的树枝一样修长→“苗条的”
questions.prompt: Is Julie ____ than you ? (提示: 苗条的)

questions.context_sentence: Facts Guangzhou Vancouver
questions.cn: 事实：广州、温哥华
questions.hint: 联想记忆：fa(发)+ct(餐厅)→发现在餐厅里吃饭是一个不可改变的“事实”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'fact'?

questions.context_sentence: Population (2024) 18.978 million 0.76 million
questions.hint: 联想记忆：popul(看作people人)+ation(名词后缀)→一个地区所有人的总和→“人口”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.人口

questions.context_sentence: Area 7,436 square km 115 square km
questions.cn: 面积：7436平方千米、115平方千米
questions.hint: 缩写记忆：k代表kilo(千)，m代表metre(米)，合起来就是“千米”
questions.prompt: The city covers an area of 500 square ____. (提示: 千米;公里)

questions.meaning: adj.平均的;平常的 n. 平均数
questions.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
questions.cn: 年平均降雨量：1923毫米、1475毫米
questions.hint: 联想记忆：av(阿凡)+er(耳)+age(年龄)→阿凡提耳朵的年龄刚好代表了当时当地的“平均”年龄
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'average'?

questions.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
questions.cn: 年平均降雨量：1923毫米、1475毫米
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：rain(雨)+fall(落下)→落下来的雨的量→“降雨量”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 降雨量

questions.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
questions.cn: 年平均降雨量：1923毫米、1475毫米
questions.hint: 联想记忆：p(大棚)+er(耳)→每个大棚里都要配一个大耳朵来听动静→“每”
questions.prompt: The car was traveling at 60 miles ____ hour. (提示: 每)

questions.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
questions.cn: 年平均降雨量：1923毫米、1475毫米
questions.hint: 缩写记忆：m代表milli(毫)，m代表metre(米)，合起来就是“毫米”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'mm'?

questions.context_sentence: Guangzhou has a pleasant temperature in January.
questions.cn: 广州一月份的气温很宜人。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please使高兴)+ant(形容词后缀)→能让人心情变得十分高兴的→“宜人的”
questions.prompt: Guangzhou has a ____ temperature in January. (提示: 宜人的;友好的)

questions.context_sentence: How do we understand differences?
questions.cn: 我们如何理解差异？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：differ(不同)+ence(名词后缀)→不同之处→“差异”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 差异

questions.meaning: adj. 相像的 adv. 相似地
questions.context_sentence: Some people think that friends should be alike, but some other people think that friends should be different.
questions.cn: 有些人认为朋友应该相像，但也有些人认为朋友应该不同。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：a(一个)+like(像)→长得或者行为表现成像一个样子→“相像的”
questions.prompt: Some people think that friends should be ____, but some other people think that friends should be different. (提示: 相像的)

questions.context_sentence: I think a good friend is like a mirror.
questions.cn: 我认为一个好朋友就像一面镜子。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：mi(米)+rr(双胞胎)+or(人)→吃米饭的一对双胞胎对着瞧，中间隔着一面“镜子”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'mirror'?

questions.meaning: n. 业余爱好;兴趣 v. 使感兴趣
questions.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
questions.cn: 我们经常一起出去玩，因为我们有相似的爱好和兴趣。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：inter(在……之间)+est(最高级后缀)→在所有的事物中，最能吸引你的东西→“兴趣”
questions.prompt: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and ____. (提示: 业余爱好;兴趣)

questions.context_sentence: I read more history books than he does, and he reads a lot of novels.
questions.cn: 我读的历史书比他多，而他读了很多小说。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：no(不)+vel(看作well好)→故事里的人过得不好，跌宕起伏的才是“小说”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 小说

questions.meaning: n.理解力;感觉 v. 意识到
questions.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
questions.cn: 她也很有幽默感。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+nse(看作nose)→通过眼睛和鼻子去捕捉外界的信息→“感觉”
questions.prompt: She has a great ____ of humour too. (提示: 理解力;感觉)

questions.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
questions.cn: 她也很有幽默感。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“幽默”就是humour的音译
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'humour'?

questions.context_sentence: He is not afraid to give his opinion, especially when he thinks I am making a mistake.
questions.cn: 他不怕提出自己的看法，尤其是当他认为我犯错误的时候。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：o(圆圈)+pin(大头针)+ion(名词后缀)→把大头针扎在圆圈里的哪个位置，代表了你的“看法”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.看法;意见

questions.meaning: adj. & adv. 较少的;更少的 pron. 较少
questions.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
questions.cn: 我不如他坦率，但我很高兴能有一个诚实的朋友。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：le(乐)+ss(两条蛇)→两条蛇在享乐，数量变得“更少的”
questions.prompt: I am ____ straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend. (提示: 较少的;更少的)

questions.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
questions.cn: 我不如他坦率，但我很高兴能有一个诚实的朋友。
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：straight(笔直的)+forward(向前)→说话直接往前冲、不绕弯子→“坦率的”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'straightforward'?

questions.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
questions.cn: 我不如他坦率，但我很高兴能有一个诚实的朋友。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hon(红/一颗红心)+est(最)→有着一颗最红、最纯洁的心→“诚实的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj.坦诚的;诚实的

questions.context_sentence: gives direct opinions
questions.cn: 给出直接的意见
questions.hint: 联想记忆：di(低)+rect(正确/直线)→低头直接走直线最省事→“直接的”
questions.prompt: He always gives ____ opinions instead of beating around the bush. (提示: 率直的;直接的)

questions.context_sentence: What can similarities bring to a friendship?
questions.cn: 相似之处能给友谊带来什么？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：similar(相似的)+ity(名词后缀)→“相似之处”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'similarity'?

questions.context_sentence: What can similarities bring to a friendship?
questions.cn: 相似之处能给友谊带来什么？
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：friend(朋友)+ship(名词后缀，表示一种状态或关系)→朋友之间的情感状态→“友谊”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.友谊;友情

questions.context_sentence: The average height of the students in the class is around 1.6 metres.
questions.cn: 班上学生的平均身高在1.6米左右。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：me(我)+tre(看作tree树)→我和一棵小树一样高，刚好是一“米”
questions.prompt: The average height of the students in the class is around 1.6 ____. (提示: 米)

questions.context_sentence: The prince, Edward, and the poor boy, Tom, are the two characters in Mark Twain's famous novel
questions.cn: 王子爱德华和穷孩子汤姆是马克·吐温著名小说中的两个人物
questions.hint: 联想记忆：p(漂亮)+rice(大米)→吃了漂亮大米长大的高贵男孩→“王子”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'prince'?

questions.context_sentence: The prince, Edward, and the poor boy, Tom, are the two characters in Mark Twain's famous novel
questions.cn: 王子爱德华和穷孩子汤姆是马克·吐温著名小说中的两个人物
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cha(茶)+rac(跑/快)+ter(特)→喝完茶后跑得特别快的书本戏剧里的“人物”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.人物;个性

questions.context_sentence: The Prince and the Pauper.
questions.cn: 《王子与贫儿》。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pau(跑)+per(每)→每天到处跑着跟人讨饭的人→“贫民;乞丐”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'pauper'?

questions.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
questions.cn: 他们因意外交换了生活。
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：ex(出来)+change(改变)→把东西拿出来做出改变，就是去和别人“交换”
questions.prompt: They ____ their lives by accident. (提示: 交换)

questions.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
questions.cn: 他们因意外交换了生活。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ac(一再)+ci(看作cry哭)+dent(凹痕)→车子一再撞出凹痕让人大哭，因为发生了“事故”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 意外;(交通)事故

questions.context_sentence: Besides this, he also realized that people's lives were much harder than he expected.
questions.cn: 除此之外，他还意识到人们的生活比他预料的要艰难得多。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ex(向外)+spect(看)→眼睛一直向外看，等待事情发生→“期待”
questions.prompt: Besides this, he also realized that people's lives were much harder than he ____. (提示: 预料;期待)

questions.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
questions.cn: 她帮助我看到困难境地中的一线光明。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sil(看作silk丝绸)+ver(看作very非常)→这种丝绸非常昂贵，在阳光下闪着“银色的”光芒
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'silver'?

questions.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
questions.cn: 她帮助我看到困难境地中的一线光明。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：line(线/线条)+ing(名词后缀)→衣服里面排成线的布料结构→“内衬”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 内衬

questions.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
questions.cn: 她帮助我看到困难境地中的一线光明。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sit(坐)+uation(名词后缀)→你现在坐在哪里、处于什么境地→“情况;状况”
questions.prompt: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult ____. (提示: 情况;状况)

questions.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
questions.cn: “一个真正的朋友会伸手去握你的手，触动你的心。”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：to(去)+u(你)+ch(吃)→用手去拿给你吃，手会产生“触碰”
questions.prompt: "A true friend reaches for your hand and ____ your heart." (提示: 触动;触碰)

questions.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
questions.cn: 陈洁害怕独自表演，所以他们通过一起演奏一首歌来解决这个问题。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：performing(表演)+alone(独自地)→不带其他人“独自表演”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文短语：短语. 独自表演

questions.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
questions.cn: 我们经常一起出去玩，因为我们有相似的爱好和兴趣。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hang(挂)+out(在外面)→把自己像件衣服一样挂在街上晃荡→“闲逛”
questions.prompt: We often ____ together after school because we have similar hobbies. (提示: 闲逛;一起玩)

questions.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
questions.cn: 她也很有幽默感。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：sense(感觉/能力)+of(的)+humour(幽默)→体会到快乐并让人发笑的能力→“幽默感”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'sense of humour'?

questions.meaning: 短语. 归功于;由于;因为
questions.context_sentence: Thanks to her, I am becoming more outgoing.
questions.cn: 多亏了她，我变得更加外向了。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：把多谢的意愿送给某人，多亏了某人→“归功于”
questions.prompt: ____ her help, I finished the hard work on time. (提示: 归功于;由于)

questions.context_sentence: He is not afraid to give his opinion, especially when he thinks I am making a mistake.
questions.cn: 他不怕提出自己的看法，尤其是当他认为我犯错误的时候。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：make(制造)+mistake(错误)→在做事情的过程中“犯错误”
questions.prompt: Don't be afraid of ____. We can learn from them. (提示: 犯错误)

questions.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
questions.cn: 他们因意外交换了生活。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：by(通过)+accident(意外事故)→由于一件没有预料到的事引起的→“偶然”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'by accident'?

questions.meaning: 短语. 一线光明;困境中的一丝希望
questions.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
questions.cn: 她帮助我看到困难境地中的一线光明。
questions.hint: 文化背景记忆：源自西方谚语“每朵乌云背后都有银边”，引申为“一线光明”
questions.prompt: Every cloud has a ____. (提示: 一线光明;一线希望)

questions.context_sentence: I know she cares about me because she's always there to listen.
questions.cn: 我知道她关心我，因为她总是倾听。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：care(在意)+about(关于)→心思全部都放在关于对方的事情上→“关心”
questions.prompt: I know she ____ me because she's always there to listen to my problems. (提示: 关心;担心)

questions.meaning: 短语. 伸手触碰;伸手去拿
questions.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
questions.cn: “一个真正的朋友会伸手去握你的手，触动你的心。”
questions.hint: 组合记忆：reach(伸出手臂)+for(为了某一目标)→把手伸出去找某个目标→“伸手触碰”
questions.prompt: "A true friend ____ your hand and touches your heart." (提示: 伸手触碰)

questions.context_sentence: We are always ready to help each other by lending a hand.
questions.cn: 我们总是准备好通过伸出援手来互相帮助。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：lend(借出)+hand(手)→把自己的手借给需要的人搭一把力→“帮助”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文短语：短语. 帮助(某人)

questions.context_sentence: How do we compare with each other?
questions.cn: 我们如何相互比较？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：com(共同)+pare(看作pair一双)→把两个东西放到一双眼睛前共同看→“比较;对比”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'compare'?

questions.context_sentence: Why don't you perform?
questions.cn: 你为什么不表演呢？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：per(每个)+form(表格/形式)→每一种形式都要上台展示一下→“表演”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'perform'?

questions.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
questions.cn: 陈洁害怕独自表演，所以他们通过一起演奏一首歌来解决这个问题。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(死/难)+olve(看作love爱)→用爱去感化死对头，从而“解决”了问题
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'solve'?

questions.context_sentence: You attended the festival last year and this year.
questions.cn: 你去年和今年都参加了这个节日。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：at(在)+tend(照料/倾向)→人到了现场去照料和关注→“参加;出席”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'attend'?

questions.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
questions.cn: 他们因意外交换了生活。
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：ex(出来)+change(改变)→把东西拿出来做出改变，就是去和别人“交换”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'exchange'?

questions.context_sentence: Besides this, he also realized that people's lives were much harder than he expected.
questions.cn: 除此之外，他还意识到人们的生活比他预料的要艰难得多。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ex(向外)+spect(看)→眼睛一直向外看，等待事情发生→“期待”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'expect'?

questions.meaning: n. 业余爱好;兴趣 v. 使感兴趣
questions.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
questions.cn: 我们经常一起出去玩，因为我们有相似的爱好和兴趣。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：inter(在……之间)+est(最高级后缀)→在所有的事物中，最能吸引你的东西→“兴趣”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'interest'?
options: 业余爱好;兴趣;使感兴趣

questions.meaning: n.理解力;感觉 v. 意识到
questions.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
questions.cn: 她也很有幽默感。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+nse(看作nose)→通过眼睛和鼻子去捕捉外界的信息→“感觉”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'sense'?

questions.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
questions.cn: “一个真正的朋友会伸手去握你的手，触动你的心。”
questions.hint: 联想记忆：to(去)+u(你)+ch(吃)→用手去拿给你吃，手会产生“触碰”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'touch'?

questions.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
questions.cn: 将每个单词与其反义词匹配：快的、害羞的、迟的、高的、懒惰的、大声的、有趣的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sh(沙发)+y(像树丫)→害羞得躲在沙发后面像个小树丫→“害羞的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 害羞的

questions.meaning: adv. 响亮地 adj.大声的
questions.context_sentence: Match each word with its opposite. fast shy late tall lazy loud funny
questions.cn: 将每个单词与其反义词匹配：快的、害羞的、迟的、高的、懒惰的、大声的、有趣的。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：l(楼)+oud(out出去)→在楼里大声叫喊声音传到外面去→“大声的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adv. 响亮地 adj.大声的

questions.context_sentence: outgoing boring short quiet early slow hard-working
questions.cn: 外向的、无聊的、矮的/短的、安静的、早的、慢的、勤奋的
questions.hint: 联想记忆：out(外面)+going(走出的)→总是喜欢走到外面和人交往→“外向的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 外向的

questions.context_sentence: Well, I'm afraid of performing alone.
questions.cn: 嗯，我害怕独自表演。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：a(一个)+lone(看作long长)→一个人孤零零地面对长路→“独自”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adv. & adj.独自;单独

questions.context_sentence: Congratulations on winning the prize at the school music festival!
questions.cn: 祝贺你在校园音乐节上获奖！
questions.hint: 联想记忆：con(共同)+grat(感激/开心)+ulation(名词后缀)→大家聚在一起表达开心→“祝贺”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 祝贺;恭喜

questions.meaning: prep.除……之外(还) adv. 而且
questions.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
questions.cn: 除了唱歌，你如何度过你的空闲时间？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：beside(在……旁边)+s(复数/多一个)→在旁边还多出了一个→“除……之外(还)”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：prep.除……之外(还) adv. 而且

questions.meaning: adj.空闲的;备用的 v. 抽出;拨出
questions.context_sentence: Besides singing, how do you spend your spare time?
questions.cn: 除了唱歌，你如何度过你的空闲时间？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(死)+pare(削/剥离)→把死板的时间剥离出一部分来，作为“空闲的”时间
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj.空闲的;备用的 v. 抽出;拨出

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：appear(出现)+ance(名词后缀)→人一出现时给人的第一感觉→“外表”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 外表;露面

questions.context_sentence: Appearance Personality Habit Strength
questions.cn: 外表、性格、习惯、优势
questions.hint: 联想记忆：se(看作see)+ri(日/天)+ous(多……的)→每天看起来都在盯着你、有很多话想说，表情很“严肃的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 严肃的;严重的

questions.meaning: adj.平均的;平常的 n. 平均数
questions.context_sentence: Average rainfall per year 1,923 mm 1,475 mm
questions.cn: 年平均降雨量：1923毫米、1475毫米
questions.hint: 联想记忆：av(阿凡)+er(耳)+age(年龄)→阿凡提耳朵的年龄刚好代表了当时当地的“平均”年龄
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj.平均的;平常的 n. 平均数

questions.context_sentence: Guangzhou has a pleasant temperature in January.
questions.cn: 广州一月份的气温很宜人。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please使高兴)+ant(形容词后缀)→能让人心情变得十分高兴的→“宜人的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj.宜人的;友好的

questions.meaning: adj. 相像的 adv. 相似地
questions.context_sentence: Some people think that friends should be alike, but some other people think that friends should be different.
questions.cn: 有些人认为朋友应该相像，但也有些人认为朋友应该不同。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：a(一个)+like(像)→长得或者行为表现成像一个样子→“相像的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 相像的 adv. 相似地

questions.context_sentence: I think a good friend is like a mirror.
questions.cn: 我认为一个好朋友就像一面镜子。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：mi(米)+rr(双胞胎)+or(人)→吃米饭的一对双胞胎对着瞧，中间隔着一面“镜子”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 镜子

questions.context_sentence: She has a great sense of humour too.
questions.cn: 她也很有幽默感。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“幽默”就是humour的音译
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n. 幽默;幽默感

questions.meaning: adj. & adv. 较少的;更少的 pron. 较少
questions.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
questions.cn: 我不如他坦率，但我很高兴能有一个诚实的朋友。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：le(乐)+ss(两条蛇)→两条蛇在享乐，数量变得“更少的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. & adv. 较少的;更少的 pron. 较少

questions.context_sentence: I am less straightforward than he is, but I am glad to have an honest friend.
questions.cn: 我不如他坦率，但我很高兴能有一个诚实的朋友。
questions.hint: 组合词记忆：straight(笔直的)+forward(向前)→说话直接往前冲、不绕弯子→“坦率的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj.坦率的;简单的

questions.context_sentence: gives direct opinions
questions.cn: 给出直接的意见
questions.hint: 联想记忆：di(低)+rect(正确/直线)→低头直接走直线最省事→“直接的”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：adj. 率直的;直接的

questions.context_sentence: The Prince and the Pauper.
questions.cn: 《王子与贫儿》。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pau(跑)+per(每)→每天到处跑着跟人讨饭的人→“贫民;乞丐”
questions.prompt: 选择对应的英文单词：n.贫民;乞丐

questions.context_sentence: They exchanged their lives by accident.
questions.cn: 他们因意外交换了生活。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ac(一再)+ci(看作cry哭)+dent(凹痕)→车子一再撞出凹痕让人大哭，因为发生了“事故”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'accident'?

questions.meaning: 短语. 一线光明;困境中的一丝希望
questions.context_sentence: She helps me see the silver lining in difficult situations.
questions.cn: 她帮助我看到困难境地中的一线光明。
questions.hint: 文化背景记忆：源自西方谚语“每朵乌云背后都有银边”，引申为“一线光明”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'silver lining'?
options: 一线光明;困境中的一丝希望

questions.context_sentence: I know she cares about me because she's always there to listen.
questions.cn: 我知道她关心我，因为她总是倾听。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：care(在意)+about(关于)→心思全部都放在关于对方的事情上→“关心”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'care about'?

questions.meaning: 短语. 伸手触碰;伸手去拿
questions.context_sentence: "A true friend reaches for your hand and touches your heart."
questions.cn: “一个真正的朋友会伸手去握你的手，触动你的心。”
questions.hint: 组合记忆：reach(伸出手臂)+for(为了某一目标)→把手伸出去找某个目标→“伸手触碰”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'reach for'?

questions.context_sentence: Chen Jie is afraid of performing alone so they solve the problem by playing a song together.
questions.cn: 陈洁害怕独自表演，所以他们通过一起演奏一首歌来解决这个问题。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：performing(表演)+alone(独自地)→不带其他人“独自表演”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'performing alone'?

questions.context_sentence: We often hang out together because we have similar hobbies and interests.
questions.cn: 我们经常一起出去玩，因为我们有相似的爱好和兴趣。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：hang(挂)+out(在外面)→把自己像件衣服一样挂在街上晃荡→“闲逛”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'hang out'?

questions.meaning: 短语. 归功于;由于;因为
questions.context_sentence: Thanks to her, I am becoming more outgoing.
questions.cn: 多亏了她，我变得更加外向了。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：把多谢的意愿送给某人，多亏了某人→“归功于”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'thanks to'?

questions.context_sentence: especially when he thinks I am making a mistake.
questions.cn: 尤其是当他认为我犯错误的时候。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：make(制造)+mistake(错误)→在做事情的过程中“犯错误”
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'make a mistake'?

questions.context_sentence: Our pleasure!
questions.cn: 我们的荣幸！
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pleas(看作please请/使高兴)+ure(名词后缀)→让人感到高兴的事情→“乐事;愉快”
questions.prompt: It's a great ____ to meet you here. (提示: 乐事;愉快;荣幸)
